hooks.command:
ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel); jq -Rs '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "SessionStart", "additionalContext": ("PRACTICES.md:
" + .)}}' "$ROOT/PRACTICES.md"; jq -Rs '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "SessionStart", "additionalContext": ("ARCHITECTURE.md:
" + .)}}' "$ROOT/ARCHITECTURE.md"; jq -Rs '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "SessionStart", "additionalContext": ("TECHNOLOGIES.md:
" + .)}}' "$ROOT/TECHNOLOGIES.md"; jq -Rs '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "SessionStart", "additionalContext": ("LESSONS_LEARNED.md:
" + .)}}' "$ROOT/LESSONS_LEARNED.md"

ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel); jq -Rs '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PostCompact", "additionalContext": ("PRACTICES.md:
" + .)}}' "$ROOT/PRACTICES.md"; jq -Rs '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PostCompact", "additionalContext": ("ARCHITECTURE.md:
" + .)}}' "$ROOT/ARCHITECTURE.md"; jq -Rs '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PostCompact", "additionalContext": ("TECHNOLOGIES.md:
" + .)}}' "$ROOT/TECHNOLOGIES.md"; jq -Rs '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PostCompact", "additionalContext": ("LESSONS_LEARNED.md:
" + .)}}' "$ROOT/LESSONS_LEARNED.md"
file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); echo "$file" | grep -q '\.swift$' && swiftlint lint --quiet "$file" 2>/dev/null || true

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(--force|-f\b|--force-with-lease)' && echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '\bmain\b'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Force push to main is blocked. Use a feature branch or ask the user explicitly."}}'; fi
